name: Guava Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Wonderslim (I use this instead of margarine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a baking basket.
3. Start the baking process.
4. The bread has a good flavor, but it seems to lack something. Adjust as needed.
5. This recipe was entered into MasterCook II and tested by Reggie Dwork (reggie@reggie.com).
